reasoning_chain_text: 1. For school years 2006-2007, 2007-2008, 2008-2009, and 2009-2010, identify NYC elementary schools ranked in the top five by environment category rating, using the specified tie-break rule.
2. Keep the elementary schools that appear in the yearly top-five lists in at least three of those four school years.
3. From those schools, keep the one located in the Bedford Neighborhood Tabulation Area.
4. For the selected elementary school, determine the school day and report it in MM/DD format.
original_final_question: Can you find the NYC elementary school that appears in the top 5 by environment category rating in at least three years from 2006-2010 and is located in the Bedford Neighborhood Tabulation Area? Please report the school day in the MM/DD format. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Top 5 elementary schools by environment score in 2006-07 (tie-break by SCHOOL name Z-A) → {PS 034 OLIVER H PERRY, EARTH SCHOOL, PS 212 MIDTOWN WEST, PS 205 ALEXANDER GRAHAM BELL, PS 120 CARLOS TAPIA}

Node 2: Top 5 elementary schools by environment score in 2007-08 (tie-break by SCHOOL name Z-A) → {P.S. 380 JOHN WAYNE ELEMENTARY, P.S. 172 BEACON SCHOOL OF EXCELLENCE, P.S. 120 CARLOS TAPIA, EXCELLENCE CHARTER SCHOOL OF BEDFORD STUYVESANT, P.S. 164 CAESAR RODNEY}

Node 3: Top 5 elementary schools by environment score in 2008-09 (tie-break by SCHOOL name Z-A) → {P.S. X307 - EAMES PLACE, P.S. 380 JOHN WAYNE ELEMENTARY, P.S. 254, P.S. 172 BEACON SCHOOL OF EXCELLENCE, P.S. 157 BENJAMIN FRANKLIN}

Node 4: Top 5 elementary schools by environment score in 2009-10 (tie-break by SCHOOL name Z-A) → {P.S. 380 John Wayne Elementary, P.S. 172 Beacon School of Excellence, Achievement First East New York School, Bronx Charter School for Excellence, P.S. 254}
Node 5: Schools appearing in the top-5 lists in at least three of the four years → {P.S. 380 John Wayne Elementary, P.S. 172 Beacon School of Excellence}
Node 6: From node 5, select the school located in the Bedford NTA → P.S. 380 John Wayne Elementary
Node 7: John Wayne Elementary School Day is on October 28
